message: Node started: Solve the transcendental equation n = exp((mu - z * e * n) / (k_B T)) / (1 + exp((mu - z * e * n) / (k_B T))) for n. Use the following values: z = 12 (from 4 + 8), mu / (k_B T) = 0.1, and e / (k_B T) = -1 / (2 * pi). Provide the numerical value of n rounded to four decimal places.
